chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.170 of 2022 Younus Textile Mills Limited Versus Federation of Pakistan and others High Court Appeal No.171 of 2022 Lucky Textile Mills Limited Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. High Court Appeal No.170 of 2022 Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1548/2022 (Stay). 2. High Court Appeal No.171 of 2022 Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1551/2022 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.05.2024 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, Advocate for appellants in both appeals. Mr. Imtiaz Mansoor Solangi, Advocate for Respondents. Ms. Wajiha Mahdi, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for appellants submits that the question involved in these appeals has already been set at rest in the case of Deewan Sugar Mills reported as 2021 PTD 1007. Since the appellants do not agree with the findings of the learned Division Bench of this Court, they are in attempt to approach Hon’ble Supreme Court and hence, learned counsel seeks disposal of these appeals on the same count so that they may exercise their right by filing petition for leave to appeal. Order accordingly. Both the appeals stands disposed of along with pending applications. Office to place a copy of this order in captioned connected appeal. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
